messages.content: Hey, good morning — it's Carlos, I'm starting my shift now.
Good morning, Carlos. Have a great shift.
What's the capital of Italy?
Rome.
Is 2 a prime number?
Yes.
Set a 10-minute timer for my eggs, please.
Timer set for 10 minutes.
Which is heavier: a feather or a brick?
A brick.
How do I tie a simple knot for a shoelace?
Cross the ends, make a loop, then pull both ends tight.
Tell me the first three months of the year.
January, February, March.
I emailed the project file to Jenna — can you confirm?
Noted — you emailed the project file to Jenna.
How many wheels does a typical car have?
Four.
Hi, it's Malik. Just walked in from the airport.
Welcome back, Malik.
Can I bring snacks to the staff meeting?
Yes, that's fine.
Remind me to water the balcony plants at 6 PM.
Reminder set for 6 PM to water the balcony plants.
Which is colder: ice cream or hot soup?
Ice cream.
How do I boil an egg?
Put eggs in a pot, cover with water, bring to a boil and cook for about 9–12 minutes.
Order these tasks for me: laundry, emails, grocery shopping.
Emails, grocery shopping, laundry.
I'm meeting Anna at 2 PM at the café — please note it.
Noted — meeting with Anna at 2 PM at the café.
What color are ripe bananas?
Yellow.
Are pets allowed in the new apartment building?
I don't know.
Count from one to five.
One, two, three, four, five.
I've turned off the oven.
Thanks — I noted that the oven is off.
Hi, I'm Mark. Are you available now?
Yes, I'm available.
What's the capital of France?
Paris.
Did Lucy pick up the mail?
No, she didn't.
Please set a reminder for 3 PM.
Reminder set for 3 PM.
Which is bigger, an apple or a watermelon?
A watermelon.
How do I boil an egg?
Put eggs in boiling water and cook for about 9 minutes.
List the steps to tie shoelaces.
Cross the laces, make a loop, wrap the other lace around, pull through.

Yes, it's booked for two at 7.
Good morning, this is Ana. Are we meeting today?
Yes, we're meeting today.
What's 2+2?
Can I bring my dog to the cafe?
No, pets aren't allowed.
Send the file to John.
File sent to John.
Which is faster, a bike or a car in town?
A car.
How do I make tea?
Boil water and steep the tea bag for 3 to 5 minutes.
What's the third day of the week?
Wednesday.
I've turned off the oven. Confirm?
Confirmed — the oven is off.
Who wrote Hamlet?
Shakespeare.

I can join in five minutes.
Is the store open on Sundays?
Yes, it is.

Hola.
Did Mark bring the keys?
No, he forgot them.
Hi, I'm Sara — are you available to chat now?
Hello Sara, I'm available.
Please set a reminder for 6 pm for Elena's call.
Reminder set for 6:00 PM for Elena's call.

An SUV is generally bigger.
How do I turn on the lamp?
Flip its power switch.
List the first three months of the year.
January, February, March.
I'll arrive 20 minutes late.
Noted, you'll arrive 20 minutes late.
Can I park here?
No, parking is not allowed here.
Good morning — this is Alex from reception.
Good morning Alex.
Print the PDF attached to my email.
I can't print directly, but I can open the PDF for you.
Is tea hotter than ice cream?
Usually tea is hotter than ice cream.

Use the mute switch or enable Do Not Disturb.

The 4 arrives first.

Confirmed — the conference room is booked for tomorrow.

J.K. Rowling.

Yes, we accept credit cards.

Good evening Maria, yes we can reschedule; what day works for you?

Living room lights are now off.

Not yet, he hasn't arrived.
Hello, I just got home.
Welcome home!

Closing the garage door now.
Which animal is larger, a cat or a horse?
A horse is larger.

Add a teaspoon of coffee to a cup, pour hot water, and stir.

1. Power on the phone. 2. Select language. 3. Connect to Wi‑Fi. 4. Sign in to your account.

Yes.

Place the egg in a pot, cover with water, bring to a boil, then cook about nine minutes.

Yes, I'm available.

Fill a pot with water and heat it until it boils.

Yes, 3 pm works for me.

No new updates at the moment.

Yes, I remember your peanut allergy.

Yes, I'm home now.

Good morning!
Morning!

Yellow.

No, I don't have your umbrella.

A van.

Place the egg in a pot, cover with water, bring to a boil, cook 9–12 minutes, then cool.

I can't access your booking; please check your ticket or airline confirmation.

William Shakespeare.

Yes.

Good morning, Nina — how can I help you?

Yes.

1. Boil water. 2. Pour over a tea bag. 3. Steep 3–5 minutes. 4. Remove the bag and serve.

Okay — you booked a flight for June 5th.

No.
